currentlyBroken.unit: NE-4:  At the 45th street Cross Passage to Tk 116 platform and Tks 34 & 35 platform.
chainNotes: Grand Central's 45th St cross passage: NE-4 is the sole elevator to the Track 116 and Tracks 34 & 35 platforms from this passage. It has been out of service since March 2023 (long-term outage). The other North End units (NE-1/2/3/5/6) are tracked but not yet modeled — passage topology unverified.

currentlyBroken.unit: At the 47th street Cross Passage in the Northwest Passage.
Elevator from the street to the Stamford/New Haven-bound platform (Track 4).
currentlyBroken.reason: The elevator leading to the tracks 2 and 4 platform at New Rochelle is closed for upgrade work.

currentlyBroken.unit: Upper Level near Northeast Passageway entrance (B Hall).
backups: Vanderbilt Av (A Hall) — ADA access to terminal
Kitty Kelly ramp, E 42nd St & Vanderbilt
Wheelchair lift at Vanderbilt Av (A Hall)
chainNotes: Grand Central Terminal proper is step-free via the Oyster Bar and Kitty Kelly ramps — no elevator outage can sever main-terminal access. Elevators listed here are conveniences within the ramp-served areas.

currentlyBroken.unit: Elevator from the New Haven-bound platform (Track 4) to the overpass
chainNotes: Greenwich: the overpass is reachable at grade, and elevator 218E is the sole step-free access to the New Haven-bound platform (Track 4) — no ramp, no backup (human-verified 2026-07-10). 218T serves the street-to-ticket-office trip only and is not part of any platform's access chain.

currentlyBroken.unit: Elevator from the overpass to the parking lot on northbound side.
Elevator from the overpass to the New York-bound platform (Tracks 4 & 2).
chainNotes: Auto-modeled from the agency's own per-elevator location text (rail chain generator, conservative rules). Only listed elevators count as step-free access — an unlisted ramp or grade path would make this over-warn, never under-warn.
